title: HELPING HANDS REENTRY OUTREACH CENTERS - 211info
text: HELPING HANDS REENTRY BYBEE LAKES HOPE CENTER HELPING HANDS REENTRY OUTREACH CENTERS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides emergency shelter and transitional housing. Participants have access to food and clothing, assistance with applying for health insurance, and a comprehensive needs assessment process supported by a case manager. Can provide information and referrals about identification replacement, schooling, and job placement services. 14355 N Bybee Lake Court Portland, OR 97203 Eligibility: -Adults age 18 and older and families with minor children under age 18; children 13 and older must be accompanied by a same-sex parent -Individuals who identify as males must stay in one of the male-only or male family dorms and females in female-only or female family dorms -Service animals are allowed, but they must be licensed, up-to-date on shots, and registered -Clients must not have or be under the influence of any intoxicants on-site or individuals with a registered sex offense Hours: Referrals are accepted 7 days per week 8am-5pm for same-day placement at the shelter when capacity allows Email (971) 333-5070 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (971) 333-5070 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Program entry is referral based through participating community partners. Community members cannot self-refer. Call or visit website to locate a referring agency. 211info is not a referring agency. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Tri-Met 11 at N Leadbetter & Bybee Lake Court is closest stop 1/4 mile from facility. The bus line only runs Monday-Friday 5am-8am and 2pm-7pm. Closest MAX stop is at the Expo Center 4 miles east of the shelter. Services: Community Shelters Community Shelters * Homeless Families Transitional Housing/Shelter Transitional Housing/Shelter * Homeless Families Other Services Offered At This Location: DONOR SERVICES - DONATION PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HELPING HANDS REENTRY BYBEE LAKES HOPE CENTER
